name: SharonAI Holdings Inc.
summary: COMPANY OVERVIEW Introduction SharonAI Holdings, Inc. is an Australian neocloud operator, purpose-built to power the next generation of artificial intelligence ( AI ) and high-performance computing ( HPC ). The Companys infrastructure is architected from the ground up to meet the specific, intensive and complex demands of modern AI training and inference workloads, machine learning, and Generative AI.
